notes: Source is the ManualsLib-hosted GY-HC500U instruction manual (268 pages) cross-referenced with EU JVC product page and multiple retailer listings. HDMI version listed as 2.0 is inferred from the maximum output resolution/rate (UHD 4K 60p 4:2:2 10-bit); the manual does not explicitly state the HDMI version number. The Remote connector is physically a 2.5mm sub-mini jack (not a standard 3.5mm TRS) — mapped to trs-3.5 as the closest available connector type; noted accordingly. The AV Out is a 3.5mm TRRS carrying composite video and audio. The camera also has a wireless LAN antenna terminal (SMA-type screw connector for external antenna), which is not a signal I/O and is omitted. Battery runs at 7.2V (BN-VC264 Li-Ion). US variant is GY-HC500U; European is GY-HC500E — I/O is identical between variants.

ports.name: SDI Out
ports.note: 3G-SDI/HD-SDI/SD-SDI; compliant with SMPTE ST424, ST292, ST259; supports embedded audio; max 1080/60p 4:2:2 10-bit

ports.name: HDMI Out
ports.note: Type A; max UHD 3840x2160 60p 4:2:2 10-bit — consistent with HDMI 2.0, but version not explicitly stated in manual

ports.name: Audio In 1
ports.note: Balanced XLR 3-pin; mic/line switchable; +48V phantom power; 3 kΩ impedance

ports.name: Audio In 2
ports.note: Balanced XLR 3-pin; mic/line switchable; +48V phantom power; 3 kΩ impedance

ports.name: AUX In
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo mini jack; unbalanced; for wireless mic receivers; -22 dBu sensitivity

ports.name: Headphone
ports.note: 3.5mm stereo mini jack; audio monitoring output

ports.name: AV Out
ports.note: 3.5mm TRRS; composite video + analog audio output

ports.name: TC In/Out
ports.note: Timecode input/output; direction selectable via TC IN/OUT switch; input 1.0–4.0 V(p-p) high-Z; output 2.0±1.0 V(p-p) low-Z

ports.name: LAN
ports.note: 100BASE-TX/1000BASE-T; used for streaming, IFB, remote control

ports.name: USB Host
ports.note: USB-A host port; for WiFi dongles, LTE adapters, or USB-Ethernet adapters; network function only per manual

ports.name: Remote
ports.note: 2.5mm sub-mini stereo jack; wired LANC remote control; closest standard is trs-3.5 but actual connector is 2.5mm sub-mini

ports.name: DC In
ports.note: 12V DC input; for supplied AC adapter
